# analytics

Rollups over runs: total/error counts and a bucketed time series, the charts above the Runs table, not the individual runs (traces). Dashboard: Runs (charts).

**When to use:** Aggregate-shaped asks: how many runs or errors over a period, run volume over time, the numbers behind the Runs-page charts (both need a --start/--end window). Not for opening individual runs (that's traces).

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `trace-summary` | `bentolabs analytics trace-summary [--start --end --q --status --tag --model ...]` | window totals: run and error counts, one number each |
| `trace-timeline` | `bentolabs analytics trace-timeline [--start --end --bucket --q --status --tag ...]` | the same counts bucketed hour/day for the histogram |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs analytics <command> --help`.
